title: REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM - 211info
text: CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES EUGENE REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social services case management for asylum seekers, refugees, and others with immigration status for help with food, transportation, health services, OHP (Oregon Health Plan), RCA (Refugee Cash Assistance), SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program ), TANF (Temporary Assistance for Needy Families ), WIC (Women, Infants and Children), and other services. Also provides employment and legal services. 1464 W 6th Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Varies according to program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 345-3628 1326 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 345-3628 ext 1326 Legal Services Main phone (541) 345-3628 ext 1339 Social Services Case Management Main phone (541) 543-5082 Employment Services Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Dari, Pashto, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On LTD EmX line; Bus Lines 41 and 43 stop two blocks away on 8th Avenue. On-site parking available. Services: Case/Care Management * Immigrants Case/Care Management * Refugees/Entrants/Asylees General Legal Aid * Immigration Issues Immigrant/Refugee Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS MATERIAL GOODS - CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES EUGENE
